title: Suria #4947
definition:
Syria = "exalted"

 1) a region of Asia bounded on the north by Taurus and Amanus ranges,
    on the east by the Euphrates and Arabia, on the south by
    Palestine, and the west by Phoenicia and the Mediterranean
nasbUsage:

 1) a region of Asia bounded on the north by Taurus and Amanus ranges,
    on the east by the Euphrates and Arabia, on the south by
